title: Tunnel worm (Kathol Rift)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Katholworm.jpg|thumb|250px]]

'''Tunnel worms''' were bio-engineered invertebrates with permeable skin which through their feeding, cleansed the [[Water/Legends|water]] supply of a mysterious artificial construct located in the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]].

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Waystation|book=The Kathol Rift|reprint=yes}}
